title: Alchemy - Get $10,000 to build on the complete Web3 development platform
description: Alchemy is the complete web3 developer platform. Combining a full stack of developer products and tools with industry-leading customer engineering support and global distribution, Alchemy powers blockchain ecosystems (chains, developers, applications) worldwide. Alchemy provides the most developer-friendly, cost-effective, and reliable SDKs and APIs for: nodes, data indexing, onboarding, and read/write operations with blockchain RPC APIs, smart wallets, rollups, and more.
